infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Accounte needs access to your microphone for voice recording features.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Accounte needs access to your camera to capture receipts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Accounte needs access to your photos to upload receipts.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Accounte to access your microphone for voice recording.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Accounte to access your photos to upload receipts.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Accounte to access your camera to capture receipts.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Accounte to access your microphone for voice transcription.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Accounte to use speech recognition for live transcription.
